focalfunc: func (c *ingressRouteTCPs) Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts v1.DeleteOptions) error
funcbody:
func (c *ingressRouteTCPs) Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts v1.DeleteOptions) error {
	return c.client.Delete().
		Namespace(c.ns).
		Resource("ingressroutetcps").
		Name(name).
		Body(&opts).
		Do(ctx).
		Error()
}
